prompt: Create a realistic full-body studio fashion editorial portrait of an adult East Asian woman standing against a clean pale gray wall and gray studio floor. She is positioned slightly right of center, facing the camera with a poised, calm expression and soft direct eye contact. Her posture is elegant and slightly angled, one leg crossing forward as if mid-step, creating a graceful elongated silhouette. One hand rests lightly near her waist while the other holds a small black gathered drawstring pouch bag with long thin tassel-like cords hanging down. She has dark black hair styled in a loose low updo with soft wispy strands framing her face and neck. Her makeup is natural and polished: luminous skin, subtle eyeliner, soft brows, faint peach blush, and muted coral-pink lips. She wears a sophisticated all-black outfit: a textured black short-sleeve knit top with a slightly fuzzy boucle-like surface, softly scalloped sleeve edges, and a relaxed tucked fit at the waist. The lower garment is a flowing black semi-sheer lace or chiffon maxi skirt with a mottled metallic floral pattern, long vertical fringe details hanging from the waistband, and soft side slits that reveal movement around the legs. The fabric has layered transparency, glossy dark patterning, and fluid folds. She wears champagne-beige pointed slingback heels with small kitten heels and a delicate bow or knot detail at the toe. The background is minimalist and uncluttered, with a smooth gray wall and floor, creating a high-fashion studio atmosphere. Use soft frontal studio lighting with a subtle directional flash effect, producing clean highlights on her face, arms, black textured top, sheer skirt fabric, heels, and handbag. Include a soft shadow cast onto the wall behind her, slightly to the left, adding depth and realism. Style: realistic studio fashion photography, full-body editorial pose, minimalist gray backdrop, elegant black monochrome styling, sheer patterned skirt, fringe details, small black pouch bag, champagne slingback heels, soft direct lighting, clean composition, high detail, vertical aspect ratio, no text, no watermark, no logos, no extra people, no distorted anatomy, no cartoon style, no clutter.
